prompt: Generate a realistic image of a small town nestled in hills. Utilize the reference depth map to guide the exact spatial layout and relative distances of buildings and landscape elements based on their proximity.
prompt_refined: Generate a realistic image of a small town nestled within undulating hills. Utilize image 1 as a depth map to accurately render the exact spatial layout and relative distances of all buildings and landscape elements. Ensure a large building is prominently positioned in the foreground on the right, with another structure in the lower-left, followed by various smaller buildings scattered across the mid-ground hills, and even more distant structures receding into the background, all adhering strictly to the depth information provided.
objects: large building in the foreground on the right
smaller buildings across the mid-ground hills
distant structures receding into the background
